note: Which services are connected, their scope, and when last validated. The /connect wizard reads and writes this so it never re-asks for something already connected.

github.method: gh CLI sign-in plus official GitHub MCP for reading
github.scope: push to the user's work repo, read repos and issues
github.detail: Signed in as bishrant-personal. Repo bishrant-personal/orive-creative-studio created and pushed.

google.method: Google MCP via OAuth (Drive, Docs, Calendar, Gmail)
google.scope: read and write docs, file outputs, schedule
google.detail: Needs sign-in in this session. Run /connect google to start the OAuth flow.

figma.scope: read references and tokens from files the user names
figma.detail: Validated with whoami. Account reachable and signed in.

slack.scope: post updates, read channels the user names
slack.detail: Validated with a channel search. Workspace reachable.

outline.detail: Validated by listing collections. Workspace reachable.

notion.scope: read and write notes, databases, and project pages
notion.detail: Used by studio-ops. Connect via the Connectors tab when a task needs Notion.

pexels.method: API key in local env as PEXELS_API_KEY
pexels.scope: search free stock images and video

capcut.method: Community MCP, the VectCutAPI stdio server, plus CapCut installed locally
capcut.scope: build and edit CapCut draft projects programmatically
capcut.detail: Used by videographer, content-studio, and cinematographer. No official CapCut MCP exists; VectCutAPI (formerly CapCutAPI) is the community engine. Run the creative-toolbox install when a task needs it: clone sun-guannan/VectCutAPI, make a Python venv, add the stdio server to .mcp.json. Requires CapCut or Jianying and FFmpeg installed.

meta_ads.method: Official Meta Ads MCP via OAuth

ga4.method: Official Google GA4 MCP or hosted bridge
